activity deviation (ach).name: Activity Deviation (ACH)
activity deviation (ach).current: Monthly Outgoing ACH >= $50K AND >= 5 std dev above 12-month profile mean

floor_amount.label: monthly ACH floor ($)
floor_amount.desc: Minimum monthly Outgoing ACH sum to trigger (currently $50K)

z_threshold.label: std dev multiplier
z_threshold.desc: Std-dev multiplier above 12-month ACH profile mean (currently 5)

activity deviation (check).name: Activity Deviation (Check)
activity deviation (check).current: Monthly Outgoing Check >= $50K AND >= 2 std dev above 12-month profile mean

floor_amount.label: monthly Check floor ($)
floor_amount.desc: Minimum monthly Outgoing Check sum to trigger (currently $50K)

z_threshold.label: std dev multiplier
z_threshold.desc: Std-dev multiplier above 12-month Check profile mean (currently 2)

elder abuse.name: Elder Abuse
elder abuse.current: Age >= 60 AND 14-day outgoing >= $5K AND >= 3 std dev above 90-day mean

velocity single.name: Velocity Single
velocity single.current: >=1 pair (in+out) within 14 days, out=90-110% of in, pair total >= $20K

pair_total.label: pair total ($)
pair_total.desc: Minimum combined in+out pair total to trigger (currently $20K)

ratio_tolerance.label: ratio tolerance
ratio_tolerance.desc: Max deviation of out/in ratio from 1.0 to trigger (currently 10% = 90-110%)

floor_amount.label: sum threshold ($)
floor_amount.desc: Minimum N-day incoming Cash+Check sum to trigger (currently $10K over 5 days)

time_window.label: time window (days)
time_window.desc: Aggregation window in days (currently 5 days); options: 3, 5, 7, 10, 14

structuring (incoming cash).name: Structuring (Incoming Cash)
structuring (incoming cash).current: 3 qualifying days within 14-day window, each day's Cash CashIn total $3K-$40K

daily_floor.label: min daily Cash amount ($)
daily_floor.desc: Minimum daily Cash CashIn total for a qualifying day (currently $3K)

days_required.label: qualifying days required
days_required.desc: Minimum number of qualifying days in the window (currently 3)

structuring (outgoing cash).name: Structuring (Outgoing Cash)
structuring (outgoing cash).current: 3 qualifying days within 14-day window, each day's Cash CashOut total $7K-$30K

daily_floor.label: min daily Cash amount ($)
daily_floor.desc: Minimum daily Cash CashOut total for a qualifying day (currently $7K)

days_required.label: qualifying days required
days_required.desc: Minimum number of qualifying days in the window (currently 3)

floor_amount.label: total Cash threshold ($)
floor_amount.desc: Minimum Cash/Currency Exchange total to trigger (currently $10K)

burst in originator activity.name: Burst in Originator Activity
burst in originator activity.current: 5-day Incoming Wire/ACH sum >= $5K, >= 3 transactions, >= 2 distinct counterparties

floor_amount.label: 5-day incoming sum ($)
floor_amount.desc: Minimum 5-day incoming Wire/ACH sum to trigger (currently $5K)

min_transactions.label: minimum transaction count
min_transactions.desc: Minimum number of transactions in the 5-day window (currently 3)

burst in beneficiary activity.name: Burst in Beneficiary Activity
burst in beneficiary activity.current: 5-day Outgoing Wire/ACH sum >= $5K, >= 3 transactions, >= 2 distinct counterparties

floor_amount.label: 5-day outgoing sum ($)
floor_amount.desc: Minimum 5-day outgoing Wire/ACH sum to trigger (currently $5K)

min_transactions.label: minimum transaction count
min_transactions.desc: Minimum number of transactions in the 5-day window (currently 3)

risky international transfer.name: Risky International Transfer
risky international transfer.current: Single Wire to/from medium-risk country >= $300K or >= $500K

floor_amount.label: single Wire floor ($)
floor_amount.desc: Minimum single Wire amount to a risky country to trigger (currently $300K)

activity deviation (wire).name: Activity Deviation (Wire)
activity deviation (wire).current: Monthly Outgoing Wire >= $100K AND >= 4 std dev above 12-month profile mean

floor_amount.label: monthly Wire floor ($)
floor_amount.desc: Minimum monthly Outgoing Wire sum to trigger (currently $100K)

z_threshold.label: std dev multiplier
z_threshold.desc: Std-dev multiplier above 12-month Wire profile mean (currently 4)

velocity multiple.name: Velocity Multiple
velocity multiple.current: 1 large CashIn within 14 days followed by >= 3 CashOuts to distinct counterparties, total >= $30K

pair_total.label: total in+out amount ($)
pair_total.desc: Minimum combined CashIn+CashOut total to trigger (currently $30K)

min_counterparties.label: minimum distinct counterparties
min_counterparties.desc: Minimum number of distinct outgoing counterparties (currently 3)

funnel account.name: Funnel Account
funnel account.current: >= 5 small inflows from distinct counterparties followed by 1 large outflow within 30 days

floor_amount.label: total inflow floor ($)
floor_amount.desc: Minimum total inflow amount across all counterparties (currently $10K)

min_counterparties.label: minimum distinct inflow counterparties
min_counterparties.desc: Minimum number of distinct inflow sources (currently 5)

round-trip.name: Round-trip
round-trip.current: Outgoing Wire >= $50K returned within 30 days to same or related customer account (net <= 5% difference)

floor_amount.label: round-trip Wire floor ($)
floor_amount.desc: Minimum Wire amount for the outgoing leg to trigger (currently $50K)

return_window.label: return window (days)
return_window.desc: Maximum days between outgoing and return leg (currently 30 days)

human trafficking indicators.name: Human Trafficking Indicators
human trafficking indicators.current: Daily Cash CashIn >= $200 for >= 14 consecutive days AND >= 1 hospitality/transport payment per day

floor_amount.label: total cash inflow floor ($)
floor_amount.desc: Minimum total cash inflow over the observation window (currently $3K)

days_required.label: minimum consecutive days
days_required.desc: Minimum number of days with qualifying cash activity (currently 14)
